contents.content: It doesn’t matter to me, I don’t mind
What do you 🧔‍♂️ drink in the morning?
Where did he study? Where did he go to school?
It's too hard, it's too difficult
What about you 👩‍🦰?, how about you 👩‍🦰?
I 🧔‍♂️ want to travel to Tel Aviv
Where are they going, where are they going to?
Yesterday he went to the beach
It's too easy/ it's too light
I traveled with them to Jerusalem
She's pretty sure, she's quite sure, she's "almost" sure
So, what are you 👩‍🦰 doing today? 😉
What did they study? What did they learn?
Are you 👩‍🦰 in the office yet?
Where did she study? Where did she go to school?
What do you 👩‍🦰 want to eat? What would you 👩‍🦰 like to eat?
We already ate, we've already eaten
Have you 🧔‍♂️ eaten yet? Did you 🧔‍♂️ already eat?
The bank is closed over the weekend
OK, let's do it, it's a done deal, agreed!
He is sitting in the living room
They are sitting by the window (near the window, next to the window)
She wants to sit in the living room
Where do you 🧔‍♂️ want to sit? Where would you 🧔‍♂️ like to sit?
She was sitting next to her boss 👩‍🦰
Noon, early afternoon, lunch time, midday
The cake will be ready in a bit
In a bit, very soon, in a few seconds, in a few minutes
He doesn't come to our class
Brad Pitt lives in the US
I feel like flying to Bali
הוא אף פעם לא שותה קפה!
contents.transliteration: hu af pa'am lo shote kafe!

contents.content: He lives in Canada, he is living in Canada, he lived in Canada
Why didn't you 👩‍🦰 come to the party?
Why did you 👩‍🦰 fly to France?
Why did you 🧔‍♂️ fly to Atlanta?
She doesn't come to class, she isn't coming to class, she didn't come to class
Do you 🧔‍♂️👩‍🦰 have family in Israel?
They have a lot of money
He met her at the beach 🏖️
They 👩‍🦰👩‍🦰 have a lot of time
On the table in the kitchen

Closet, cabinet, cupboard, wardrobe
 Closets, cabinets, cupboards, wardrobes
He's sure the window is open 😝
It's not mine, This isn't mine
Is it yours 👩‍🦰?, Is this yours 👩‍🦰?
She's sure the door is open
I sent him a WhatsApp message
Did you 👩‍🦰 send us the link?
I sent you 👩‍🦰 a song on WhatsApp
My Pad thai is too spicy 🥵
To buy or not to buy...? 🎭
Hold on, what are you🧔‍♂️ doing???
What are you 👩‍🦰 doing right now?
Do you 🧔‍♂️ like to binge watch TV?
He's stressed out because of the boss
When do you 👩‍🦰 need to be there?
To be or not to be? 🎭✨🎭✨
It wasn't ok, It wasn't right
We wanted to come with you 🧔‍♂️
I wanted to talk to you 👩‍🦰
It was perfect at the beach ☀️
